name: linkedin-posts-comments
description: Daily automation workflow for finding qualified LinkedIn posts, marking irrelevant posts, and drafting short comment options into a provided Google Sheet.

interface.shortDescription: Research LinkedIn posts into a provided Sheet.
interface.longDescription: Find a requested number of recent LinkedIn posts from simple daily instructions, use the user's Apify key with sensible defaults, generate five low-key comment options for each scraped post row, mark low-quality posts as irrelevant, and append rows to the Google Sheet supplied by the automation.
defaultPrompt: Run with my sheet, keywords, filter, and MCP.
Find LinkedIn posts and draft comments.
Append qualified posts to my Sheet.
